title: Ensure that multi-factor authentication is enabled for all privileged users
remediation_template: Enable MFA via Azure AD Conditional Access Policy targeting all users with privileged roles.

title: Ensure that 'Secure transfer required' is set to 'Enabled' for Storage Accounts
remediation_template: Enable 'Secure transfer required' on the Storage Account: az storage account update --name <account> --resource-group <rg> --https-only true

title: Ensure that storage account access is restricted (no public network access)
remediation_template: Restrict public network access: set publicNetworkAccess to Disabled and configure private endpoints or service endpoints for authorized access only.

title: Ensure Storage Account Blob Public Access is disabled
remediation_template: Disable blob public access at the storage account level to prevent anonymous access to blob containers.

title: Ensure that 'Soft Delete' is enabled for Azure Storage Blob
remediation_template: Enable soft delete on blob storage to allow recovery of accidentally deleted data. Recommended retention period: 7+ days.

title: Ensure that SSH access is restricted from the internet
remediation_template: Remove NSG rules allowing port 22 from source 0.0.0.0/0 or *. Use Azure Bastion or VPN for administrative access.

title: Ensure that RDP access is restricted from the internet
remediation_template: Remove NSG rules allowing port 3389 from source 0.0.0.0/0 or *. Use Azure Bastion for RDP access.

title: Ensure Network Security Group Flow Logs are enabled
remediation_template: Enable NSG flow logs and configure them to send to a storage account and optionally Log Analytics for traffic analysis.

title: Ensure that Azure Key Vault Soft Delete is enabled
remediation_template: Enable soft delete on Key Vault to protect against accidental or malicious deletion of keys, secrets, and certificates.

title: Ensure that Azure Key Vault Purge Protection is enabled
remediation_template: Enable purge protection on Key Vault to prevent permanent deletion during the soft-delete retention period.

title: Ensure Key Vault public network access is disabled
remediation_template: Disable public network access on Key Vault and configure private endpoint or firewall rules to restrict access to trusted networks.

title: Ensure that 'Auditing' is set to 'On' for SQL Servers
remediation_template: Enable auditing on SQL Server and configure audit log destination (Log Analytics, Storage Account, or Event Hub).

title: Ensure that SQL Server public network access is disabled
remediation_template: Disable public network access on SQL Server and use private endpoints for secure connectivity from authorised VNets.

title: Ensure SQL Server Advanced Threat Protection is enabled
remediation_template: Enable Microsoft Defender for SQL (Advanced Threat Protection) on all SQL Servers to detect anomalous activities.

title: Ensure that managed disk encryption is enabled for Virtual Machines
remediation_template: Enable Azure Disk Encryption using Azure Key Vault to encrypt OS and data disks on all Virtual Machines.

title: Ensure that boot diagnostics are enabled for Virtual Machines
remediation_template: Enable boot diagnostics on Virtual Machines to aid in troubleshooting boot failures and capture serial console output.

title: Ensure diagnostic logs are enabled for Key Vaults
remediation_template: Enable diagnostic logging on Key Vault and send logs to Log Analytics workspace or Storage Account for audit trail.

title: Ensure that Azure Web Applications have HTTPS-only enabled
remediation_template: Enable HTTPS-only on App Service to redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS and ensure encrypted communications.

title: Ensure Web Application remote debugging is disabled
remediation_template: Disable remote debugging on all App Service instances. Remote debugging opens a port that can be exploited if exposed.

title: Ensure SQL Server Active Directory administrator is configured
remediation_template: Configure an Azure AD administrator for SQL Server to enable AAD authentication and reduce reliance on SQL authentication.
